title: SEO Analyzer Input
description: Audit webpages for 15+ on-page SEO factors and get a weighted score (0-100). Checks title, meta, headings, images, links, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD, and technical SEO. Supports bulk URL processing.

urls.title: URLs to Analyze
urls.description: List of webpage URLs to audit for SEO. Supports any publicly accessible URL. Add as many as needed -- processing scales linearly. Example: 'https://example.com', 'https://example.com/blog/post-1'.

analysisType.title: Analysis Type
analysisType.description: 'full' = complete 15+ factor audit with SEO score. 'score' = score only (fastest). 'headings' = heading hierarchy analysis. 'links' = internal/external link breakdown.
